CustomField.formula: IF (IsBlank (AccountId) || IsBlank (Account.SDR_Name__c),NULL, IF(Account.SDR_Name__r.UserRole.Id = "00Eb0000000i11vEAA" , "SDR - Chat", IF(Account.SDR_Name__r.UserRole.Id = "00Eb0000000i120EAA" , "SDR - Chat Manager", IF(Account.SDR_Name__r.UserRole.Id = "00Eb0000000aL6mEAE" , "SDR - ENT", IF(Account.SDR_Name__r.UserRole.Id = "00Eb0000000aLObEAM" , "SDR - ENT Manager", IF(Account.SDR_Name__r.UserRole.Id = "00Eb0000000t99iEAA" , "SDR - SMB", IF(Account.SDR_Name__r.UserRole.Id = "00Eb0000000aLOgEAM" , "SDR - SMB Manager", NULL)))))))
CustomField.label: SYS SDR Name Role
